senses.definition: including everyone or everything, particularly for a single price

examples.x: They booked an all-inclusive vacation package that covered flights, accommodations, meals, and activities.
The resort offers all-inclusive services, ensuring guests have everything they need during their stay.
She appreciated the all-inclusive nature of the conference, which included all meals, materials, and workshops.
The membership provides an all-inclusive experience with access to the gym, pool, and fitness classes.
They chose an all-inclusive cruise, so they wouldn't have to worry about additional costs for food and entertainment.

senses.definition: the time of year during which people travel a lot and prices are very high

examples.x: Hotel prices are always higher during peak season due to the increased demand.
The ski resort was bustling with tourists, as it was the peak season for winter sports.
Farmers hire extra workers during the peak season to help with the harvest.
It's difficult to find a campsite in the national park during peak season, so reservations are recommended.

senses.definition: the time of year during which there is not much travel or business

examples.x: Hotels often offer discounted rates during the off season to attract more guests.
They decided to visit the beach during the off season to avoid the crowds.
Restaurants in tourist areas may reduce their hours during the off season.
Farmers use the off season to prepare their fields for the next planting.
Many airlines offer cheaper flights during the off season when demand is lower.

senses.definition: extremely comfortable, elegant, and often made with high-quality materials or features

examples.x: She indulged in a luxurious spa treatment, complete with massages and facials.
The luxurious yacht sailed across crystal-clear waters, providing a first-class experience.
The luxurious silk dress she wore to the gala event caught everyone's attention.
The resort offered luxurious villas with private pools and stunning ocean views.
He enjoyed a luxurious lifestyle, traveling in private jets and staying at five-star hotels.

senses.definition: exceptionally beautiful, delicate, and well made

examples.x: The bride wore an exquisite gown adorned with intricate lace and embroidery.
The artist's paintings are known for their exquisite detail and vibrant colors.
They enjoyed an exquisite dinner at the upscale restaurant, savoring each course.
The antique vase was exquisite, with its delicate patterns and flawless craftsmanship.
The ballet performance was exquisite, captivating the audience with its grace and precision.

senses.definition: originating in another country, particularly a tropical one

examples.x: She loves to collect exotic plants from tropical regions for her greenhouse.
The market sells a variety of exotic spices and ingredients from around the world.
They went on a vacation to an exotic island in the Caribbean, enjoying the pristine beaches and lush landscapes.
The restaurant specializes in exotic cuisine from Southeast Asia, featuring dishes with unique flavors and ingredients.
Her living room is decorated with exotic artwork and artifacts collected during her travels abroad.
The restaurant served exotic dishes from around the world.

senses.definition: an arrangement to live as a foreign vacationer or student in someone's home

examples.x: During her trip to Japan, she opted for a homestay with a local family to experience authentic Japanese culture.
Homestays are becoming popular alternatives to hotels for travelers seeking immersive cultural experiences.
Staying in a homestay allows visitors to experience daily life in a foreign country firsthand.

senses.definition: a vacation that one spends at or near one's home instead of traveling somewhere

examples.x: They decided to have a staycation this summer, exploring local attractions and relaxing at home.
A staycation can be a great way to unwind without the stress of traveling long distances.
During their staycation, they visited museums, parks, and restaurants in their own city.
Many families choose a staycation to save money while still enjoying quality time together.
She planned a staycation spa day, complete with massages and facials at a local wellness center.

senses.definition: a pleasure or educational trip that may last a day

examples.x: The class went on an educational outing to the science museum to learn about space exploration.
The company organized a team-building outing to the ropes course for employees to bond and build trust.
Families often plan outings to local parks or beaches to enjoy outdoor activities together.
The senior center arranged a cultural outing to visit an art gallery downtown.
As part of their summer camp program, the children went on an outing to a nearby farm to learn about agriculture and interact with animals.

senses.definition: a trip that has been organized for a particular purpose such as a scientific or military one or for exploration

examples.x: The Arctic expedition aimed to study the effects of climate change on polar ecosystems.
The military organized an expedition to secure strategic positions in the region.
The archaeological expedition uncovered ancient artifacts buried beneath the desert sands.
They embarked on an expedition to summit the highest peak in the Himalayas.
The space agency launched an expedition to explore Mars and search for signs of life.

senses.definition: a plan of the route and the places that one will visit on a journey

examples.x: The tour company sent us a detailed itinerary, breaking down our day-to-day activities and highlighting the main attractions.
When planning his backpacking trip through Asia, Mark used a travel app to help him design the perfect itinerary.
The travel agent listened to our interests and tailored an itinerary that focused on wildlife and nature reserves.

senses.definition: the lowest class of accommodations offered in a hotel, on a plane or ship

examples.x: They booked seats in tourist class for their flight to save money on travel expenses.
The cruise ship offers comfortable accommodations in tourist class cabins with ocean views.
The hotel offers a range of amenities even in its tourist class rooms, ensuring a comfortable stay for budget-conscious travelers.
Passengers in tourist class have access to entertainment and dining options on long-haul flights.
Tourist class accommodations on trains often provide basic amenities for passengers traveling shorter distances.

senses.definition: to provide someone with a better seat on an airplane or a better room in a hotel than the one for which they have paid

examples.x: Due to overbooking in economy class, the airline upgraded several passengers to business class.
As a gesture of goodwill, the hotel upgraded the couple to a deluxe suite with a panoramic view of the city skyline.
The newlyweds were pleasantly surprised when the hotel upgraded them to a luxurious honeymoon suite.
The frequent flyer was delighted when the airline upgraded him to first class.
The hotel manager personally upgraded the VIP guest to a premium suite.

senses.definition: traveling over a long distance, particularly when it involves transporting passengers or goods

examples.x: Truck drivers often prefer long-haul routes that cover several states, allowing them to maximize their time on the road.
The shipping company specializes in long-haul transportation of goods across international borders.
She enjoys reading novels during long-haul train journeys across Europe.

senses.definition: to board a plane or ship

examples.x: After completing the check-in process, the passengers can embark the train to their destination.
Passengers are requested to embark the airplane at Gate 5 for departure.
The captain announced that we could embark the ferry to the nearby island.
The travel agent will provide all the necessary documents required to embark the international flight.

senses.definition: a short break or stay in a journey

examples.x: We had a layover in Chicago for two hours before our connecting flight to New York.
During our layover in Paris, we explored the city and visited the Eiffel Tower.
The airport lounge provided a comfortable place to relax during our layover.
The flight attendant announced a layover in Atlanta due to weather conditions.
They used their layover wisely to catch up on work and emails before the next leg of their journey.

senses.definition: a place where lost things are stored until their owners come and collect them

examples.x: I left my glasses in the store, but the lost and found had them.
She found her bag at the lost and found after it was misplaced during the event.
If you lose something, check the lost and found at the airport.

senses.definition: someone who spends a vacation living in a tent, etc.

examples.x: The campers enjoyed hiking and fishing during their weekend getaway in the mountains.
As an experienced camper, he knew how to build a campfire and pitch a tent with ease.
The campground was full of families and solo campers enjoying the summer weather.
The camper woke up early to watch the sunrise over the lake from their tent.
The young camper learned how to build a campfire and cook meals over an open flame.

senses.definition: a series of rooms, particularly in a hotel

examples.x: The newlyweds stayed in a luxurious honeymoon suite with a stunning ocean view.
The business executive booked a suite to have extra space for meetings and relaxation.
Our suite included a spacious living area, a kitchen, and a private balcony.
The hotel offered complimentary breakfast and concierge services for all guests staying in a suite.
They upgraded to a suite for their anniversary trip to enjoy the added comfort and amenities.

senses.definition: pain and redness of the skin caused by overexposure to the sun

examples.x: After spending the entire day at the beach without sunscreen, she suffered from a severe sunburn.
He could feel the sting of sunburn on his shoulders after hiking under the intense midday sun.
Sunburn can be prevented by applying a high-SPF sunscreen and wearing protective clothing.
Her nose and cheeks turned bright red from sunburn after the weekend outdoor festival.
The doctor advised treating sunburn with aloe vera gel to soothe the pain and reduce redness.

senses.definition: the darkened or brown color of a person's skin that is caused by spending much time in the sun

examples.x: She returned from her tropical vacation with a deep suntan that made her glow.
He was proud of his suntan after spending the summer working outdoors.
A suntan can be a sign of too much sun exposure, which can damage the skin over time.
After just a few days at the beach, his suntan was noticeably darker than before.

senses.definition: (of a person or a person's skin) to become darkened or brown as a result of exposure to the sun

examples.x: She tans easily and always has a golden glow in the summer.
He tanned quickly after just a few days at the beach.
They tanned while enjoying their tropical vacation.
I don’t tan well and usually end up with a sunburn instead.

senses.definition: to go somewhere, particularly frequently or in large numbers

examples.x: With the new shopping mall opening, locals have started to resort to it for their weekend outings.
When the park introduced new attractions, families began to resort there for their recreational activities.

senses.definition: (in a hotel, etc.) an available room

examples.x: The hotel had a vacancy in their deluxe suite due to a last-minute cancellation.
She called the resort to inquire about the vacancy for the upcoming weekend.
The sign outside the motel read "No Vacancy," indicating all rooms were occupied.
He booked a room online after checking the hotel's website for vacancy.
The innkeeper offered a discount on the vacancy to attract more guests during the offseason.

senses.definition: intended for, visited by, or attractive to tourists, in a way that one does not like it

examples.x: The once serene village has become quite touristy, with souvenir shops and crowded streets.
They preferred exploring hidden gems rather than visiting the usual touristy spots.
The restaurant was too touristy for their taste, with high prices and mediocre food.
While the beach is beautiful, it's very touristy during the summer, making it hard to find a quiet spot.
She wanted to avoid the touristy areas and experience the city like a local.

senses.definition: (in a hotel, etc.) a room with two single beds

examples.x: They booked a twin bedroom for their stay, ensuring each friend had their own bed.
The hotel offered a cozy twin bedroom with a view of the garden.
The twins preferred a twin bedroom so they could share a room but still have separate beds.
For their business trip, the colleagues chose a twin bedroom to save on accommodation costs.
The bed and breakfast had a charming twin bedroom decorated in a rustic style.

senses.definition: used by or intended for wealthy people

examples.x: They dined at an upmarket restaurant known for its gourmet cuisine and elegant ambiance.

senses.definition: supplied or given for free

examples.x: The hotel provided complimentary breakfast and Wi-Fi for all its guests.
She received a complimentary upgrade to a first-class seat on her flight.
At the event, attendees were given complimentary gift bags filled with samples and brochures.
The spa offered complimentary use of the sauna and steam room with any treatment.
Visitors to the museum were delighted to find that admission was complimentary on weekends.

senses.definition: easy to remember or worth remembering, particularly because of being different or special

examples.x: The speech he gave at the graduation was so inspiring that it became the most memorable part of the ceremony.
Their wedding was a memorable event, filled with laughter and joy.
The memorable vacation to the mountains was filled with unforgettable experiences.
Meeting her favorite celebrity was a memorable moment she would cherish forever.
The memorable concert left the audience buzzing with excitement long after it ended.
That was the most memorable concert I've ever attended.

senses.definition: used for wishing a person good luck, particularly when they want to travel somewhere
an urge to vomit that is caused by motion, particularly when a person is in a moving vehicle such as a car, train, etc.

examples.x: She took medication before the road trip to prevent motion sickness.
The cruise provided free motion sickness tablets for passengers who felt queasy.
His motion sickness made it difficult for him to enjoy amusement park rides.
Sitting in the front seat of the car helped reduce her motion sickness during long drives.
They avoided reading books while traveling to prevent motion sickness.
